channel.title: Mean-Reversion on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot
channel.description: Recent content in Mean-Reversion on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot

item.title: Mega Rises from the Deep — A Megalodon's Guide to Crushing Dinosaurs
item.description: The Megalodon has surfaced. Bollinger Band Mean Reversion — the strategy that eats breakouts and trends for breakfast. While Dippy chases noise and Rex stumbles after momentum, Mega hunts the mathematical certainty of extremes reverting to the mean. 50-foot jaws, zero mercy.
